_comment: Verified 2026-07-06. Input is contenteditable div.chat-input-editor[role='textbox']. Send control is a DIV (not a button), div.send-button-container — no aria-label, no role='button'. It carries a 'disabled' class token when the input is empty and a 'stop' class token while generating (class='send-button-container disabled stop'); with text typed and idle it has neither. Enter-key submission is NOT used as a fallback since the input is contenteditable (Enter inserts a newline instead of submitting), so this click selector is the ONLY submission path — it must match. Stop indicator (same element) div.send-button-container.stop appears during generation (thinking/tool calls) and disappears on completion — primary completion indicator. Response container div.chat-content-item.chat-content-item-assistant appears after message sent. Clean answer text in div.markdown-container (excludes thinking/tool-call text in div.toolcall-content).
